evals.prompt: 苹果的护城河还在吗？最近感觉创新不行了，帮我看看它的business quality
evals.expected_output: Quality score ~85, Wide Moat. Flags ROE distortion. Identifies ecosystem switching costs as primary moat source. Addresses innovation concern.

assertions.name: states_score_and_moat
assertions.text: Explicitly states the quality score and moat rating

assertions.name: identifies_moat_source
assertions.text: Identifies at least one Dorsey moat source for Apple

assertions.name: flags_roe_distortion
assertions.text: Flags ROE >100% buyback distortion

assertions.name: addresses_user_concern
assertions.text: Addresses the innovation concern

assertions.name: explains_score_drivers
assertions.text: Breaks down dimension-level score drivers

assertions.name: business_context
assertions.text: Provides business context beyond numbers

evals.prompt: 帮我对比一下微软、谷歌和Meta的business quality，我想知道哪家的生意质量最好
evals.expected_output: Ranks all three with MSFT likely highest. Explains dimension-level differences. Identifies distinct moat sources per company.

assertions.name: ranks_all_three
assertions.text: Clearly ranks MSFT, GOOGL, META by quality

assertions.name: explains_ranking_differences
assertions.text: Explains WHY winner ranks highest at dimension level

assertions.name: identifies_moat_sources
assertions.text: Identifies distinct moat sources for each company

assertions.name: comparative_insight
assertions.text: Provides comparative insight across companies

assertions.name: actionable_conclusion
assertions.text: Gives clear recommendation on which to research further

evals.prompt: 想买点银行股，JPM的基本面怎么样？是不是好生意？
evals.expected_output: Score ~46, Narrow Moat. Explains missing dimensions for banks. Provides bank-specific moat context (scale, regulatory barriers).

assertions.name: states_score_and_moat
assertions.text: States quality score and moat rating

assertions.name: explains_missing_dimensions
assertions.text: Explains missing dimensions and weight redistribution

assertions.name: bank_specific_context
assertions.text: Provides bank-specific business context

assertions.name: addresses_fcf_anomaly
assertions.text: Explains bank FCF volatility

assertions.name: honest_about_limitations
assertions.text: Acknowledges model limitations for financial sector

evals.prompt: 英伟达质量分很高但我总觉得它是周期股，帮我分析一下到底算不算好生意
evals.expected_output: Score ~85, Wide Moat. Addresses cyclicality through low stability score. Identifies CUDA ecosystem moat. Warns about peak-cycle risk.

assertions.name: states_score_and_moat
assertions.text: States quality score and moat rating

assertions.name: addresses_cyclicality
assertions.text: Addresses cyclicality concern with stability score evidence

assertions.name: identifies_moat_source
assertions.text: Identifies NVDA moat source (CUDA, GPU design)

assertions.name: nuanced_conclusion
assertions.text: Provides nuanced answer about quality vs cyclicality tension

assertions.name: peak_cycle_warning
assertions.text: Warns about peak-cycle margin distortion
